settings.commandToExecute: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Unrestricted -Command "Invoke-WebRequest -Uri https://nodejs.org/dist/v18.19.0/node-v18.19.0-x64.msi -OutFile node.msi; Start-Process msiexec.exe -Wait -ArgumentList '/i node.msi /quiet /norestart'; Remove-Item node.msi"

settings.commandToExecute: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y ca-certificates curl gnupg && sudo mkdir -p /etc/apt/keyrings && curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/gpgkey/nodesource-repo.gpg.key | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/nodesource.gpg && echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/nodesource.gpg] https://deb.nodesource.com/node_18.x nodistro main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/nodesource.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y nodejs rsyslog
